acceptance.after: alt_pose is retained; reject_ambiguous defaults false; racket_pose_hypotheses.json carries both SE3 hypotheses and ambiguity evidence; primary digest remains 379e156f8baa2a601c53315512fbd954f1ec67a03135f714987a3e9f7daea955

acceptance.after: Exact repair markers appear in ball/player summaries and skeleton confidence_provenance; measured values remain unmarked and confidence values are unchanged

tests/racketsport/test_ball_temporal_filter.py:53, test_player_id_repair.py:31, test_pose_temporal.py:1, test_racket6dof_primitives.py:1, and test_racket_stage_runner.py:71 cover repair markers and compatibility.
runs/lanes/evidence17_20260716/report.json:1 contains the mandatory schema-shaped lane report, including deferred diffs and the dated inflight note.

full_suite.failure_notes: EXIT 1. One test_best_stack_resolution failure reproduces alone because concurrent spine-owned process_video.py requires validation.equal=true while the test fake omits it. Six review-server tests fail because the managed sandbox denies TCP bind. Two persistent-worker tests fail because it denies AF_UNIX bind. One storage-policy audit hit a concurrent __pycache__ removal race and passes alone, EXIT 0. None involves evidence17-owned implementation, but not every failure is proven at clean HEAD. An earlier default-matplotlib run aborted at 51% with EXIT 134; the Agg run is the authoritative complete result.

honest_issues: VERIFIED=0 remains binding. The NS-01.7 objective is: "Make classified audio affect events; hash contact dependencies; pass blur/diameter; retain both IPPE poses; mark repaired confidence". The stop rule is: "Do not raw-average modalities or promote on residual/overlay gains."

Classifier PENDING: audio remains a weak review_only heuristic. pop_transient_heuristic_not_classifier and cue_not_gate_verified warnings remain. Typing, gating, and audio-primary behavior require a trained frozen classifier; normal-path audio remains non-gating.

Fenced public schemas cannot directly carry alternate racket hypotheses or ball/player conf_source fields. This lane therefore uses an additive racket hypotheses artifact and typed stage summaries; skeleton markers use existing confidence_provenance.

Audio onset content already embeds its threshold summary. If external audio configuration is introduced, its explicit config path and stage identity should also be hashed.

Blur/diameter remains analysis-only: generate an immutable blur sidecar after BALL, hash it and ball_candidates.json, join evidence by frame/timebase, and apply separately capped likelihood factors only to existing visual proposals. Preserve raw evidence and missing reasons; never create, veto, or gate contact from blur/diameter.
BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) none. reject_ambiguous=false is a correctness/contract change, not model or policy selection.

2026-07-16 inflight note: evidence17_20260716 completed scoped non-ball_arc plumbing and focused verification; runner dependency hashing and blur/diameter generation remain deferred to spine16/manager, classifier training and public-schema consolidation remain PENDING, and VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
next: Spine16/manager should apply and test the deferred dependency hunk, decide when fenced public schemas may expose the fields directly, and wire blur/diameter only after the runner produces an immutable sidecar. A trained classifier gate is required before audio promotion claims.
